stages.task: Pull prime contractors on SAM.gov ICAM vehicles via Playwright MCP — extract company name, CAGE code, subcontracting plan URL, POC email if listed
Score primes by subcontracting plan presence (required for contracts >$750K), NAICS alignment with our capabilities (541512, 541519), and recent award size. Filter to top 10.
Generate tailored capability statement per prime using claude -p. Send via cold email script (cold_email_outreach.py) targeting small business liaison officers.
